data.title: Little Tikes Push and Ride Racer – (Amazon Exclusive), 22"L x 10"W x 17"H with screws

features: Made in the USA. The Little Tikes Company is located in the heartland of America.
A riding toy and walker in one. Toddlers can ride themselves or use kid-sized push bar as a push toy or car
foot to floor ride on indoors or outdoors
Low seat makes it easy for toddler to get on and off
High back and sturdy handles help keep young racers steady
Maximum weight limit: up to 50 lbs. Assembly required.

relatedProducts.Title: VEVOR Ride On Push Car for Toddlers, Ages 19+ Months, Ride Racer, Sit to Stand Toddler Ride On Toy, Kids Ride On Car with Music Steering, Horn & Under Seat Storage, Ride On Toy for Boys Girls,
relatedProducts.Features: PP | 【Ride on Car】: Designed just for little ones aged 1-3, this ride on push car helps them build balance while looking super stylish. Moms will love taking their kids out with this cool stroller! | 【Strong Load Capacity】: Made from tough, impact-resistant PP material and with a sturdy four-wheel design, this toddler ride on car can support up to 48.5 lbs/22 kg. It's built to last and give your kid endless fun. | 【Dynamic Car Music】: Our toddler ride on toys steering wheel plays cheerful kids' songs with just a press of a button, adding extra joy to playtime. Plus, the smooth design of the steering wheel makes it easy and comfy for your kid to steer. | 【Under Seat Storage】: The toddler riding car features a handy storage compartment under the seat, ideal for storing toys, water bottles, tissues, and more while out and about. It's a great way to help your kid learn to keep things tidy. | 【Safety Design】: Security first! The ride on car has a wide backrest and an anti-backward support bar at the rear to keep your kid safe from tipping over while riding. Enjoy peace of mind while your little one rides around.

Similar_Items_Quick_Delivery.Title: Radio Flyer Busy Buggy, for Toddlers 1-3, 3-in-1 Push Walker Ride On Car with 17 Sensory Activities, Anti-Tip Feature, Under-
Similar_Items_Quick_Delivery.Features: 3-IN-1 WALKER & RIDE-ON: The Radio Flyer Busy Buggy is a versatile first vehicle with push walker, ride on, and sensory play modes to build confidence, balance, and coordination. | 17 INTERACTIVE ACTIVITIES: Keep little hands busy with interlocking gears, sliding beads, a clicking spare tire, folding mirrors, a fun horn, and an interactive dashboard - encouraging sensory and imaginative play. | WALK & RIDE DEVELOPMENT: The push walker design supports beginner walkers with an anti-tip feature and stable base. When ready, kids can sit and scoot to develop fine and gross motor skills. | BUILT-IN STORAGE: Seat flips open for under-seat storage so favorite toys can tag along. Recommended for toddlers 1-3 years old, with a weight capacity of 42 lb. | BELOVED ICON OF PLAY: For over a century, Radio Flyer has inspired joyful play with wagons, trikes, and more. As a Certified B Corp, we create lasting products that spark imagination while caring for future generations.

Similar_Items_Quick_Delivery.Product_Description: The Radio Flyer Busy Buggy is a do-it-all toddler favorite that grows with your child. Three play modes - push walker, ride on, and sensory activity play - support early balance, confidence, and motor skill development. With 17 engaging sensory activities including gears, beads, a clicking spare tire, folding mirrors, a horn, and an interactive dashboard, kids stay entertained as they explore. A stable base and anti-tip feature support early walkers, and when it's time to ride, little ones can scoot around independently. The seat flips up to reveal under-seat storage for must-bring toys. 42 lb max weight capacity. Recommended for ages 1-3. Radio Flyer is a Certified B Corp dedicated to durable products that inspire active play and warm family memories.
